caption: Happy New Year! 🎉 Start 2026 with a gift that changes lives. For just $5,500, CAMINO builds a permanent home for a Honduran family. Whether you give $5 or $5,000, your generosity adds up. Ready to make 2026 matter? Give at the link in bio.
imageNote: A family standing in front of a new CAMINO home on a bright day — hope and new beginnings

caption: Today we celebrate Epiphany — the journey of the Magi to find Christ. Like them, our volunteers journey to Honduras seeking to serve and be transformed. The star still leads us onward. ✨
imageNote: Star of Bethlehem imagery, or a volunteer walking toward a Honduran community at sunrise

caption: Every child deserves safety, love, and a future. 🙏 In Honduras, CAMINO walks alongside families working to give their children exactly that — stable housing, rooted communities, hope for tomorrow. These children are why we build.
imageNote: Honduran children playing outside, smiling, at a CAMINO community site — joyful and dignified imagery

caption: 🙋 Applications are now open for 2026 mission trips! This year, CAMINO is heading to Honduras for multiple trips across the calendar. Whether it's your first mission trip or your tenth — there's a spot for you. Learn more and apply at the link in bio.
imageNote: Excited volunteers on-site in Honduras, or a graphic with key trip dates and application CTA

caption: Meet [Volunteer Name]. 👋 She traveled to Honduras with CAMINO not knowing what to expect — and came home knowing she'd go back every year. This February, we're sharing the stories of volunteers who've been transformed by the work in Honduras. Who's next? Follow along. ❤️
imageNote: A compelling portrait of a volunteer on-site in Honduras, or a before/after photo of them at home vs. in Honduras

caption: Today we join Christians worldwide in prayer for the persecuted church. 🕊️ Our partners in Honduras face their own struggles — but they worship with a joy that puts comfortable Christianity to shame. Pray for our brothers and sisters in Honduras and around the world today.
imageNote: A humble Honduran church building, or believers gathered in prayer — quiet, reverent imagery

caption: This Valentine's Day, give the gift of love that lasts. ❤️ A mission trip scholarship helps a volunteer reach Honduras — and helps a Honduran family receive the gift of a home. Sponsor a volunteer. Give love that builds. Link in bio.
imageNote: A volunteer and a Honduran homeowner working together — warmth, human connection, hands building something

caption: Lent begins today. For 40 days, we're invited to fast, pray, and give — to strip away what's comfortable and make room for what matters. Our volunteers do that every time they board a flight to Honduras. 🙏 What are you giving up to make room for something greater this Lent?
imageNote: Simple cross imagery, ashes, or a quiet devotional scene. Dark and reflective tone.

caption: Spring is here — and so is our annual giving campaign! 🌱 Every dollar you give between now and April 30 goes directly to sending volunteers and building homes in Honduras. Help us reach our spring goal. Give at the link in bio.
imageNote: New construction underway in Honduras — fresh lumber, bright colors, community energy

caption: Happy International Women's Day! 💪 In Honduras, women are the pillars of their communities — raising families, building businesses, and holding neighborhoods together. CAMINO is honored to walk alongside them. Today we celebrate their strength, dignity, and resilience. 🇭🇳
imageNote: A Honduran woman — perhaps the head of a household receiving a new home — looking confident and dignified

caption: Today is World Water Day. 💧 Clean water access remains a critical challenge for many Honduran communities. CAMINO is committed to building not just homes, but whole communities — including infrastructure that makes clean water possible.
imageNote: A community water source in Honduras, or a CAMINO volunteer helping with water infrastructure

caption: On Palm Sunday, Jesus rode into Jerusalem not on a war horse but on a donkey — humble, peaceful, purposeful. That's the kind of servant leadership CAMINO strives to bring to every community in Honduras. We don't arrive with fanfare. We arrive with tools and willing hands.
imageNote: Palm branches or a volunteer team arriving in a Honduran community — humble and purposeful

caption:
Q1 2026 is in the books. 📊 Here's what your generosity made possible this quarter:
→ [X] volunteers prepared for summer trips
→ [X] homes in planning
→ [X] donors gave for the first time

Thank you. The numbers are just the beginning of the story.
imageNote: A simple infographic or stat graphic — clean, branded in amber/teal colors

caption: Tonight we remember Jesus kneeling before his disciples — basin in hand, towel on arm — washing feet. Servant leadership isn't a strategy. It's a posture. Every volunteer who bends their back to lay a block in Honduras is living this moment. #MaundyThursday
imageNote: Volunteer working alongside a Honduran homeowner, or hands laying concrete blocks together

caption: Good Friday reminds us that love costs something. Our volunteers give their time, their treasure, and their comfort — because they believe love is worth the cost. Today we sit with that truth. 🙏
imageNote: Quiet, reflective imagery — cross silhouette at sunset, or a construction site with no workers (stillness)

caption: He is risen! 🌅 Easter is the hinge of everything we do. Because Jesus rose, death doesn't get the final word — not in that tomb, and not in the communities of Honduras that CAMINO serves. New life. New homes. New hope. Happy Easter from our family to yours! 🌺
imageNote: A newly completed home with a family standing outside, or a sunrise over Honduras. Joyful, colorful.

caption:
⏱️ T-minus 77 days to our first summer trip.

Passports? ✅ Vaccinations? ✅ Flights? ✅
Heart ready? Still working on it. 😅

Our Culpeper team is gearing up for Honduras. Follow along as we share what goes into preparing for a week of building and serving. 🔨🏠
imageNote: Volunteers packing bags, reviewing documents, or attending a pre-trip meeting — anticipation and preparation

caption: It's National Volunteer Week, and we are overwhelmed by the generosity of the CAMINO volunteer community. 💛 This week, we're spotlighting the people who give their vacation days, their savings, and their hearts to serve in Honduras. Day 1: Meet [Name]. [Share their story here.] #ThankYouVolunteers
imageNote: A volunteer in action on a Honduras job site, or a candid portrait — real, genuine, not posed

caption: 🌎 Happy Earth Day! As people of faith, we believe creation care is part of our calling. CAMINO tries to build sustainably — using materials that last, reducing waste, and working with — not against — the land in Honduras. How are you stewarding the earth today?
imageNote: Green Honduras landscape — lush mountains, a CAMINO construction site in harmony with the environment

caption: May is Mission Month at CAMINO! 🗓️ All month, we're sharing behind-the-scenes stories, volunteer spotlights, and looks at what's coming this summer in Honduras. Follow along — and if you feel called, applications are still open. Link in bio.
imageNote: A collage banner of Honduras trip photos or a team photo from a previous trip

caption: Happy Mother's Day! 🌸 Today we honor the mothers in our CAMINO family — the Honduran mamas building better lives for their children, and the mothers back home who pack their kids' bags and send them across the world to serve. You are all heroes.
imageNote: A Honduran mother with her children outside their new home, or a volunteer mom with her family before a trip

caption: On Pentecost, the Spirit fell — and the disciples went everywhere. That sending impulse is what drives CAMINO. The Spirit still moves, still calls, still sends ordinary people to extraordinary places. Are you ready to go? 🔥
imageNote: Fire imagery or a volunteer team in a Honduran village — movement, energy, community

caption: Honduras is a country of 10 million people — of deep culture, resilient faith, and extraordinary beauty. We honor the richness of Latin America and the partnerships that make CAMINO possible. 🇭🇳 We don't go to Honduras to save it. We go to belong to it.
imageNote: A cultural moment in Honduras — traditional dress, community celebration, or a beautiful landscape

caption: 🌟 Introducing our Volunteer of the Month series! Starting in June, we'll spotlight one CAMINO volunteer each month — sharing their story, their why, and what Honduras meant to them. Know someone who should be featured? Tag them below! 👇
imageNote: A standout photo of a volunteer in Honduras — working, praying, or sharing a moment with a local family

caption: Today is the International Day of Innocent Children Victims of Aggression. 🕊️ We hold space for every child whose safety, childhood, or future has been taken. In Honduras, CAMINO works in communities where this pain is real — building homes that offer stability in unstable times.
imageNote: A quiet, dignified image of Honduran children — respectful, not exploitative. A peaceful moment.

caption: Today is World Refugee Day. 🌍 Honduras is one of the top countries of origin for migrants and asylum seekers in the western hemisphere. Families leave because they lack safety and stability at home. CAMINO's work — building homes, building community — is migration prevention. One family at a time.
imageNote: A Honduran family at the door of their new CAMINO home — safety, permanence, hope. Home as refuge.

caption: Happy Father's Day! 👨‍👧 Today we celebrate the dads who show up — for their families, for their communities, and yes, for their mission teams in Honduras. A special shout-out to every father who has served with CAMINO and brought that spirit of sacrifice home.
imageNote: A Honduran father with his family in front of a completed CAMINO home, or a male volunteer with local children

caption: This Sunday, we commission our Culpeper team as they head to Honduras! 🙏 Come pray them off at [church name] at [time]. If you can't make it in person, pray with us wherever you are. These men and women are heading somewhere hard and holy. Send them well.
imageNote: A church commissioning ceremony or a team huddle in prayer — community sending moment

caption: They're off! ✈️🇭🇳 Our Culpeper team departed this morning for Honduras. Follow along all week as they build, serve, and encounter God in the mountains and valleys of this beautiful country. Pray for safety, health, and open hearts. #CaminoHonduras
imageNote: Team photo at the airport with luggage and matching CAMINO shirts — excited, nervous, ready

caption: Day 2 in Honduras 🔨 Walls are going up and hearts are breaking open. Our team worked alongside Honduran families today — and a few volunteers discovered muscles they didn't know they had. 😄 Follow our stories for live updates from the field. 🇭🇳 #CaminoHonduras
imageNote: Action shots from the job site — laying blocks, mixing concrete, volunteers and Honduran families working side by side

caption: Day 3 in Honduras 🙏 Today our team paused from building to visit the community — meeting families, sharing meals, and hearing stories. You can build a house in a week, but relationships take a lifetime. These connections are what make CAMINO what it is. #CaminoHonduras
imageNote: Team sharing a meal with a Honduran family, or a volunteer listening to a community elder tell their story

caption: Freedom to serve. 🇺🇸🇭🇳 This July 4th, as we celebrate freedom in America, our team is in Honduras building alongside families who dream of a better future for their children. Liberty looks like love in action. Thank you to every volunteer who gave their holiday for Honduras.
imageNote: American and Honduran flags side by side, or the team working on-site in Honduras on July 4

caption: Day 4 in Honduras 🏗️ While others celebrate July 4th with fireworks, our team is lighting up a job site. Halfway through the week — and the walls are almost at roof height. Proud of this crew. 🇭🇳🇺🇸 #CaminoHonduras #4thOfJuly
imageNote: Construction progress photo — walls visible, team working hard, late afternoon light in Honduras

caption: Day 5 in Honduras 💪 The roof is going on! Our team is pushing through the final days — tired, sunburned, and more grateful than they expected. This is what it means to serve. Ask them when they get home. 🏠 #CaminoHonduras
imageNote: Roofing work underway — team on the walls, corrugated metal being placed, Honduras landscape in the background

caption: Day 6 — final workday in Honduras 🎉 The house is nearly complete. Tomorrow the family gets the keys. Today our team is doing finishing work — floors, doors, windows — and trying not to cry too many times. 😭❤️ #CaminoHonduras
imageNote: Finishing details on the home — a door being hung, windows installed, a family watching with anticipation

caption: Welcome home! 🏠❤️ Our Culpeper team touched down today — changed forever by what they experienced in Honduras. Thank you for praying, giving, and following along. The homes get built with your support. The volunteers come home different because of your prayers.
imageNote: Team arriving home at the airport, exhausted but smiling. Or a reunion moment with family.

caption:
"I went to Honduras thinking I was going to help them. I came home realizing they helped me more." — [Volunteer Name], Culpeper 2026

That transformation is the heart of CAMINO. Read the full story at the link in bio.
imageNote: A reflective portrait of a returned volunteer, or a quote graphic with a Honduras background photo

caption: 🌟 Happy International Youth Day! Young people are at the heart of CAMINO — as the volunteers who give their summers to serve in Honduras AND as the next generation of Honduran leaders who will shape their communities. The future is in good hands. 🇭🇳
imageNote: Young volunteers working alongside Honduran youth — intergenerational, cross-cultural, full of energy

caption: 📣 Announcing our Fall 2026 Mission Trip to Honduras! Applications are now open for [dates]. Limited spots available — apply early. This is your chance to serve, build, and be changed. Link in bio. 🇭🇳
imageNote: A beautiful landscape photo from Honduras — mountains, community, or a job site ready to begin

caption: 📚 It's International Literacy Day. In Honduras, access to education changes everything — the difference between a cycle of poverty and a pathway out. CAMINO believes in building communities where children can learn, dream, and lead. Link in bio.
imageNote: Honduran children with books, at a school desk, or with a volunteer during a community education moment

caption: Hispanic Heritage Month begins today! 🇭🇳 CAMINO is honored to partner with our Honduran brothers and sisters — not as outsiders looking in, but as family working alongside. Hispanic Heritage Month is every month for us. Gracias a Honduras por enseñarnos a servir con alegría.
imageNote: A beautiful portrait of Honduran community members — dignified, warm, culturally rich imagery

caption: 🕊️ Today is the International Day of Peace. At CAMINO, we believe peace is built one house, one relationship, one trip at a time. Not with speeches — with cinder blocks and cement and the willingness to show up for a stranger across the world. Happy Peace Day.
imageNote: A completed CAMINO home with a family gathered outside — peace, wholeness, home

caption:
Q3 2026 impact update 📊 Our summer trip season is complete, and here's what happened:
→ [X] homes built
→ [X] volunteers served
→ [X] communities reached

Fall giving is open now. Help us finish 2026 strong. Give at the link in bio.
imageNote: A group photo from the summer mission trips, or a completed home with family

caption: Thinking about 2027? 🤔 CAMINO's 2027 mission trip interest form is now open! Early interest helps us plan communities, secure materials, and build the best possible experience for volunteers. Sign up at the link in bio — no commitment required.
imageNote: Looking forward — a photo of volunteers on site in Honduras, or a planning-themed graphic with Honduras imagery

caption: 🌽 Today is World Food Day. In Honduras, food insecurity affects millions — particularly children. CAMINO's community development work supports families working toward stability in every dimension — including access to food and nutrition programs. Learn how you can help.
imageNote: A Honduran family garden, a meal being shared, or CAMINO volunteers participating in a community nutrition program

caption: All Saints Day. Today we remember those who have gone before us — volunteers, community members, and friends of CAMINO who are no longer with us but whose faith left marks on this ministry. Thank you. Your lives still speak. 🕯️
imageNote: Candlelight imagery, or a quiet moment at a Honduran worksite — reflective and tender

caption: 📅 Mark your calendar: GivingTuesday is December 1, 2026. That's the one day a year when the whole world decides to give together — and we want CAMINO's supporters ready. Save the date. We'll have a special announcement and a matching gift opportunity. Stay tuned. 👀
imageNote: A countdown graphic or a teaser visual with 'December 1' prominently displayed — build anticipation

caption: Yes, it's World Toilet Day. 🚽 And yes, we're talking about it — because sanitation is a matter of dignity and human health. CAMINO's community development work includes sanitation improvements because every family deserves clean, safe facilities. #WaterAndSanitation
imageNote: Community infrastructure work — a latrine being built or improved, or a simple graphic about sanitation access stats

caption: Happy Universal Children's Day! 🧒 Today we celebrate every child's right to grow up safe, loved, and full of possibility. In Honduras, CAMINO builds homes that give children exactly that — a stable place to sleep, study, and dream. Every child deserves that. Will you help? Link in bio.
imageNote: Honduran children playing or learning — joyful, full of life. A bright and hopeful image.

caption:
Grateful. Full. Sent. 🙏

This Thanksgiving, CAMINO is thankful for:
→ 400+ volunteers who've served in Honduras
→ The communities we call family
→ Every donor who said "yes"
→ A God who shows up when we show up

Thank you for being part of this family. Happy Thanksgiving! 🦃
imageNote: A group shot of volunteers and Honduran community members around a meal, or a warm family moment at a completed home

caption: The first candle of Advent is Hope. 🕯️ In Honduras, CAMINO families wait with hope — for a dry floor, a solid roof, a neighborhood that cares. This Advent, we light the first candle for every family still waiting. Come, Lord Jesus.
imageNote: A single candle lit against a dark background, or a Honduran family waiting at the door of a house under construction

caption:
🎉 TODAY IS GIVINGTUESDAY! 🎉

For just $5,500, a Honduran family gets a permanent home. Today, your gift goes further — [partner] is matching every dollar donated.

Don't wait. Homes are built one gift at a time. Give now at the link in bio. 🏠🇭🇳
imageNote: Major CTA graphic — GivingTuesday branding in CAMINO amber/teal colors. Family in front of completed home.

caption: Peace is the second Advent candle. 🕯️🕯️ Peace isn't just the absence of conflict — it's the presence of wholeness. When CAMINO builds a home, we're not just adding walls. We're building peace — for a family, for a neighborhood, for a future. #Advent2026
imageNote: Two candles lit, or a completed CAMINO home at dusk with a family inside visible through the window

caption: Joy is the third Advent candle — the pink one, the one that surprises you in the middle of waiting. 🕯️🕯️🕯️ We've seen that joy on job sites in Honduras: a volunteer whose heart breaks open, a family who can't stop smiling at their new door. That's Advent joy. #Gaudete
imageNote: Three candles, the center one pink. Or a joyful moment between a volunteer and a Honduran family.

caption:
⏳ 16 days left to make your 2026 year-end gift.

A tax-deductible gift before December 31 supports CAMINO's mission to build homes and develop communities in Honduras. Every dollar counts. Every home matters.

Give before the deadline — link in bio.
imageNote: A simple image of a completed home with a '16 days left' overlay, or a countdown graphic

caption: Love is the fourth candle. 🕯️🕯️🕯️🕯️ Love is what sent Jesus. Love is what sends our volunteers. Love is what CAMINO is made of — neighbor to neighbor, across oceans and language and culture. One week until Christmas. Light the last candle. #Advent2026
imageNote: All four candles lit. Or a volunteer and a Honduran homeowner embracing, hands clasped.

caption:
"The Word became flesh and dwelt among us." — John 1:14

This Christmas, we're grateful for every volunteer who became a neighbor to someone in Honduras. Thank you for dwelling with us, journeying with us, and giving so that families have homes to celebrate in. Merry Christmas from CAMINO! 🎄🇭🇳
imageNote: A Honduran family celebrating Christmas in their new home, or a nativity scene in a Honduran village context

caption: 📆 Last week of 2026. Don't let the year end without making your tax-deductible gift to CAMINO Honduras. Homes don't build themselves — but with your help, they do. Give by December 31. Link in bio.
imageNote: A peaceful, hopeful image of a Honduran family in their completed home — warmth and gratitude

caption:
2026 in review 📊

This year, our CAMINO family:
✅ Completed [X] homes
✅ Served alongside [X] communities
✅ Sent [X] volunteers to Honduras
✅ Raised $[X] to build a better future

None of this happens without YOU. From every family who now has a roof over their heads — thank you. Here's to 2027. 🙌
imageNote: A montage or grid of 2026 trip photos, or a before/after of a completed home
